title: leucanthemum lanceolatum
intro: Leucanthemum lanceolatum, also known as the narrow-leaved daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. Leucanthemum lanceolatum has been reported to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antiseptic for wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried flowers for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
